subcodes.first_line: All the peoples of the world, in their own estimation, gaze upon the Truth and claim attainment of its knowledge, yet the Truth Itself hath not acknowledged this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اهل عالم بگمان خود بحق ناظرند و بعرفانش فائز ولکن حق اقرار نفرموده این
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
